race.comment: FREE BEER (2) was far from his best last time in town but his three runs prior were all encouraging. Willing to give another chance on the quick back-up over a track and trip he relishes. HARD LEAF (3) tacked on soundly into a midfield finish last time at headquarters after making a complete mess of his rivals here the start prior. Expect him to settle more handy from the kind draw and be in this for a long way. It's impossible to knock the form of COME ALONG JEFFREY (1) who shoots for four on the bounce. Stays at the winning trip and has been kept fresh with 33 days in between runs. No reason he can't win again. SILVER CHAOS (8) comes through strong form races and was a dominant winner two back. Ticking along nicely and is right in the mix. THE KILL CLUB (6) backs up quickly and is yet to miss the frame here from four attempts. Have to include.
